tossups.question: Elton John helped rediscover paintings of male nudes in this genre like Autumn Blue that were painted in Falmouth, Cornwall by the gay artist Henry Scott Tuke. A painting in this genre by Simon de Vlieger mirrors the composition of an earlier canvas since they both drew inspiration from a print by Maertan de Vos. Albert Pinkham Ryder's Constance is a painting in this genre of which Ivan Aivazovsky was a romantic master. The Utrecht School influenced Aelbert Cuyp's golden lighting in paintings in this genre like The Maas at Dordrecht. The only work in this genre by Rembrandt was stolen from the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum in 1990. Poetry by Thomas Campbell accompanied a painting in this genre of an object "tugged to her last berth." For 10 points, name this genre of paintings like J.M.W. Turner's The Fighting Temeraire which depicts ships in the ocean.
tossups.answer: seascape [or marine painting; or maritime painting; or naval painting; accept other clear equivalents; prompt on ship paintings; prompt on landscapes]
tossups.answer_sanitized: seascape [or marine painting; or maritime painting; or naval painting; accept other clear equivalents; prompt on ship paintings; prompt on landscapes]
